summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Odoo ODS PostgreSQL schema management system. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend loading with intermittent data loading delays.

ui_bugs.issue: Inconsistent data loading - metrics sometimes show 0 values on initial load, then load correctly after wait
Shows 'Conectando...' (Connecting) initially, then updates to 'PostgreSQL' with green indicator - timing issue

integration_issues.issue: API calls have loading delay causing metrics to show 0 initially before updating with correct values (13 tables, 3 views, 38 indexes)

passed_tests: All 9 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
PostgreSQL connection test - returns connected: true with version info
Migration status - shows schema_exists: true, 13 tables, 3 views, all_ok: true
Schema tables endpoint - returns 16 items (13 tables + 3 views) with correct structure
Sync jobs endpoint - returns 6 configured jobs (RES_COMPANY, RES_USERS, RES_PARTNER, PRODUCTS, ATTRIBUTES, POS_ORDERS)
Sync logs endpoint - returns empty array as expected (no sync runs yet)
Schema indexes endpoint - returns 38+ indexes in odoo schema
Migration execution - returns success: true with duration_ms
Frontend Spanish UI - Panel, Historial navigation labels correct
Frontend dashboard loads with title 'Panel de Migración'
Frontend navigation between Dashboard (/) and Logs (/logs) pages works
Frontend tabs navigation (Tablas, Sync Jobs, Índices) functional
Frontend connection status shows green PostgreSQL indicator when loaded
Frontend displays correct metrics when data loads: 13 tables, 3 views, 38 indexes, status OK
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider adding loading states or optimizing initial API call timing to prevent metrics from showing 0 values during initial page load. The delay causes user confusion as it appears data is missing initially.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 85% (most functionality working, minor loading timing issues)
